howItWorks.intro: This crypto whale alert calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Cryptocurrency markets are highly volatile. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

faq.question: What defines a crypto whale?
faq.answer: There is no strict definition, but generally: holding/moving over $10M in a single cryptocurrency is considered a whale. For Bitcoin, owning 1,000+ BTC qualifies. About 2,000 addresses hold more than 1,000 BTC, controlling roughly 40% of all Bitcoin.

faq.question: Do whale transactions affect price?
faq.answer: Large on-chain transfers do not directly move prices, but whale movements to exchanges often signal selling intent and can trigger panic. A whale depositing $50M+ to an exchange typically correlates with 2-5% price drops within 24 hours.

faq.question: Is the Crypto Whale Alert Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard cryptocurrency and blockchain formulas trusted by crypto investors and traders. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What coin price should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate coin price value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

sections.title: What Is the Crypto Whale Alert Calculator?
sections.body: The Crypto Whale Alert Calculator is a free online tool designed for crypto investors and traders who need quick, accurate calculations in the cryptocurrency and blockchain space. By entering your coin price, 24h trading volume, transaction size, you get instant results including coins transferred, % of daily volume, % of market cap. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting coins transferred right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In cryptocurrency and blockchain, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by crypto investors and traders worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to evaluate your crypto portfolio with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your coin price and need to find the right coins transferred. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Coin Price ($)
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your coin price — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: 24h trading volume, transaction size, market cap. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your coins transferred, % of daily volume, % of market cap. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your coin price before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
